'''Oran-µ''' was the largest [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Oranessan system/Legends|Oranessan system]].

==History==
In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], shortly before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the [[Hound's Tooth/Legends|''Hound's Tooth'']] was pursued around Oran-µ by a [[KDY security cruiser]].

{{Planet-stub}}
